allow: PowerShell($src = Get-Content "c:\\Users\\sunjeung.kim\\Desktop\\Claude\\Project_B\\room-dashboard.html"; $js = $src[215..1117] -join "`n"; $tmp = Join-Path $env:TEMP "rd_check.js"; Set-Content -Path $tmp -Value $js -Encoding utf8; $node = \(Get-Command node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\); if\($node\){ & node --check $tmp; if\($?\){ "SYNTAX OK" } } else { "NODE NOT FOUND" })

PowerShell($src = Get-Content "c:\\Users\\sunjeung.kim\\Desktop\\Claude\\Project_B\\room-dashboard.html"; $js = \($src[215..1117] -join "`n"\); foreach\($pair in @\(@\('{','}'\),@\('\(','\)'\),@\('[',']'\)\)\){ $o=\([regex]::Matches\($js,[regex]::Escape\($pair[0]\)\)\).Count; $c=\([regex]::Matches\($js,[regex]::Escape\($pair[1]\)\)\).Count; "{0} {1}  open={2} close={3}  diff={4}" -f $pair[0],$pair[1],$o,$c,\($o-$c\) }; "backticks: " + \(\([regex]::Matches\($js,'`'\)\).Count\))
